components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action across archive surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { appearance: none; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.95rem 1.3rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-strong)); color: var(--text-on-accent); font-family: var(--body-font); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.03); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Pill navigation link in the site header.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-block-size: 44px; padding: 0.7rem 0.95rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--nav-pill-border); background: var(--nav-pill-bg); color: var(--nav-pill-color); font-family: var(--body-font); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: var(--nav-pill-hover-bg); color: var(--nav-pill-hover-color); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Editorial sports almanac register: ink-navy surfaces, warm amber authority, teal precision, evidence before flourish.
keyCharacteristics: Fraunces for words, Teko for large numbers
Pill interactive elements with quiet resting states

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: Accents appear on ≤10% of any screen surface.

rules.name: The Fraunces Rule
rules.body: Every word in Fraunces; large numbers in Teko only.

dos: Use design tokens and --light-* overlays in light theme
donts: No side-stripe borders on cards or callouts
